title: Extraterrestrial construction materials
what_it_does: comprehensive review assessing physical features and property characteristics of lunar/Martian/NEO construction materials
relation_to_our_contract: surveys materials and properties not system-level route-closure coordinates; our contract is complementary at the reporting/decidability level

title: Review of Lunar Regolith Forming Technologies for In-situ Manufacturing/Construction on the Lunar Surface
what_it_does: recent review of lunar regolith forming technologies (sintering/melting/additive) for in-situ manufacturing/construction
relation_to_our_contract: surveys/compares forming routes; does not specify a coordinate-level reporting standard for route-closure decidability

title: Parametric review of existing regolith excavation techniques for lunar ISRU and recommendations for future excavation experiments
what_it_does: parametric review of excavation techniques; explicitly calls for standardised recording of specific data and defines key performance parameters for future experiments
relation_to_our_contract: direct precedent for reporting standardization in an adjacent ISRU sub-field (excavation); our contract extends the same logic to directed-energy consolidation route-closure coordinates

title: A Review of Lunar Regolith Radiation Shielding Using In Situ Resource Utilization
what_it_does: review of ISRU regolith radiation-shielding approaches
relation_to_our_contract: secondary; shows ISRU route reviews are organized by application/material not by route-closure reporting coordinates

title: Additive manufacturing of hydrogel-based lunar regolith pastes: a pathway toward in-situ resource utilization and in-space manufacturing
what_it_does: additive-manufacturing process study/pathway for lunar regolith
relation_to_our_contract: secondary; another route-demonstration that reports process/material descriptors not deployed-capacity/efficiency closure coordinates
